chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5905 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِنَّ اَللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى قَسَمَ بَيْنَكُمْ أَخْلاَقَكُمْ كَمَا قَسَمَ بَيْنَكُمْ أَرْزَاقَكُمْ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5905 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Indeed, Allah (swt), the Blessed and Exalted, has distributed your manners among you just as He (swt) has distributed your sustenance among you."
